note: Two records, never blurred. The 60-DAY VALIDATION is a backtest of the exact live rulebook over the prior 60 days — mechanical, fixed rules, no hindsight on any single trade (though the pair–strategy map was tuned on this window, so live may run softer). LIVE trades are logged the hour they conclude and never edited. Same rules on both: 30-pip first target (half banked, stop locks +25), 25-pip fixed stop, 24-hour timeout. Historical reporting of a mechanical system — not financial advice.
